A branch represents a physical library o: A branch represents a physical library or service location where items can be stored, borrowed, and returned. Organizations can manage multiple branches as needed.

Locations represent physical areas withi: Locations represent physical areas within a branch where items are shelved or stored. They can be nested to reflect real-world structures, such as a section containing shelves.
